title: cenchrus thunbergii
intro: Cenchrus thunbergii, also known as Japanese millet or Japanese brome, is a type of annual grass native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus thunbergii include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cenchrus thunbergii is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
